prompt: Recreate this exact glossy 3D 'Orange Dream' flavor-badge logo identically — same 'Orange' in glossy orange script, 'Dream' in creamy white script, same creamsicle popsicle bars, orange slices and whole orange, whipped-cream swirls, juice splash and droplets, same Cinema-4D/Octane glossy hyper-real style, same layout and colors. The ONLY change: place it on a clean, pure solid WHITE background (remove the checkerboard transparency grid entirely). Keep crisp clean edges and a subtle soft drop shadow so the white 'Dream' text and the cream swirls still read clearly against the white. Pure solid white background, centered with margin.
